subcodes.first_line: A heavenly repast hath been sent down from the heaven of divine favor in such wise as to leave all in wonderment, and perchance the gaze [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: مائده معنوی بشانی از سماء عنایت الهی نازل که کل را متحیر نموده و شاید نظر
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @call to action, @praise and encouragement, @the divine emanation; the all-pervading bounty of God
